title: lycopus lucidus subsp. americanus
intro: Lycopus lucidus subsp. americanus, also known as American bugleweed, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This herb is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the production of thyroid hormones, making it useful in treating hyperthyroidism and anxiety. The health benefits of American bugleweed include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and regulating hormonal imbalances. It can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional herbal medicine to enhance its effects.
